prompt: Create a highly detailed 35mm low-angle studio fashion portrait of a stylish male model, a well-groomed adult man with dark slicked-back hair, standing centered on a giant curved white platform suspended just above a glossy reflective lavender floor. Shoot from a dramatic low angle with a slightly wide lens so the model appears tall and the shoes and floor reflection are visible at the bottom. He wears a bold tailored blazer with oversized tropical floral print in teal, burgundy, cream, and dark green, over a beige button-up shirt, slim tan trousers, and polished dark brown dress shoes. Above and behind his head are exactly 2 massive suspended circular light rings: one upper ring glowing soft lavender-white and one lower ring glowing pastel peach-warm white, both hanging from thin vertical cables. The background is a seamless curved studio wall in muted rose, salmon, and dusty pink tones with soft gradients. Use cinematic fashion editorial lighting, crisp fabric detail, glossy reflections on the floor, realistic skin and hair texture, shallow depth of field, symmetrical centered composition, luxurious futuristic set design, no text, no logos, no watermark.
